content.hint: 承认问题并承诺具体改进行动，使用 'I'll + 具体行动' 结构
content.situation: 经理指出员工在报告中缺乏数据支持，建议未来加强分析深度。
content.speakerText: I noticed your recent reports don't include enough data to back up your conclusions.
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你最近的报告中缺乏足够的数据来支持你的结论。
content.knowledgePoint: 用具体行动回应建设性反馈
content.responseTemplate: You're right — I'll ___ for the next one.

content.hint: 表达‘变得更好’的常用搭配
content.template: You're right — I’ve been nervous about it. I’d like to ___ better at receiving feedback.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：get better at doing something
